# What this PR does

<!--
One short paragraph describing the change. For a new provider page, state
the provider and integration type. For a fix or update, state what changed
and why.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] If this is a new integration provider page: copied from `templates/integration.html`
- [ ] All `[[PLACEHOLDER]]` tokens replaced, including `[[INTEGRATION_TYPE]]`
- [ ] Parent integrations index page updated with a card in the correct alphabetical position (if adding a new provider)
- [ ] `docs/sitemap.xml` updated with a new entry in the correct alphabetical position (if adding a new page)
- [ ] Code examples verified against the actual Decibri API at <https://github.com/decibri/decibri>
- [ ] No em dashes anywhere in the change
- [ ] Decibri capitalised correctly in prose
- [ ] No commercial claims added (no "best", "fastest", "industry-leading", etc.)
